notes: Illustrative example only (not real benchmark data). Shows the pipeline-arm shape: full traceability, zero fictional assertions (tests were written against the running app per CLAUDE.md §3.8), one Gate-4 correction. A raw-arm record for the same story would typically show traceability_coverage near 0 and is recorded separately (one JSONL line per story x arm). Real records live in evidence/benchmark.jsonl; see docs/benchmark-protocol.md.
